themes.name: ocean
visual_stimuli: calm ocean horizon at golden hour
underwater coral reef with shafts of light
themes.meditation_seed: Imagine standing at the edge of a vast, calm ocean. Feel the warm sand between your toes, hear the rhythm of the waves...

themes.name: flying

soundscape.primary: wind sounds at altitude, distant birdsong

visual_stimuli: aerial view of mountains through clouds
themes.meditation_seed: Feel your body becoming lighter with each breath. Your feet lift gently from the ground, and you begin to rise...

themes.name: forest
visual_stimuli: ancient forest with light filtering through canopy
autumn forest path with fallen leaves
themes.meditation_seed: You are walking along a soft path through an ancient forest. The air smells of earth and green things growing...

themes.name: space

soundscape.primary: deep space ambient, low frequency drones

visual_stimuli: inside a crystal cave of stars
themes.meditation_seed: You float in the infinite dark between stars. Each breath takes you deeper into the cosmos, where time has no meaning...

themes.name: childhood

soundscape.primary: gentle music box, distant laughter, rain on windows

themes.meditation_seed: Picture the front door of the home you grew up in. Push it open and step inside. Everything is exactly as you remember...

themes.name: healing

soundscape.primary: singing bowls, gentle stream, soft chimes

visual_stimuli: warm golden light enveloping the body
cozy room with fireplace and rain outside
themes.meditation_seed: A warm, golden light surrounds you. It enters through the top of your head and flows down through your entire body, dissolving any tension...
